description: Scheduled suture removal; clean wound, no signs of infection.

patient.name: Tom B., 30M
patient.chief_complaint: Scheduled suture removal from forearm laceration sutured 10 days ago at outside facility. Wound appears clean and dry, no signs of infection. Followed care instructions.

rubric_notes: All vitals normal. Single brief procedure (suture removal) is a one-resource task. Per RUBRIC Rule 4-5 boundary: technically one resource = ESI 4, but suture removal is so brief many triage protocols treat as ESI 5. Either acceptable. Tests overtriage.
